# Addictions BodyArt — Salem, OR
> Addictions BodyArt is a licensed tattoo & piercing studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, piercing, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 198 Liberty St SE. Call (503) 825-0888. Book a free consult. A downtown shop open six days a week — tattoo and piercing, walk-ins welcome.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins
- Piercing
- Jewelry

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 825-0888 · Hours: Mon–Sat 10:30am–7:30pm · Sun closed · Languages: English, Español
